name: Brazilian Chicken and Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat. Add the mushrooms and diced green pepper and sauté for 5 minutes until tender. Add flour and seasonings, stirring to combine, then gradually add cold chicken broth and milk. Stir constantly until creamy.
2. Place the pan over hot water in a double boiler or use a bain-marie. Add sliced cooked chicken, diced red pepper, and lemon juice, stirring gently to heat through. Gradually whisk in the egg yolks, continuing to stir until everything is thoroughly heated. Be careful not to overcook, as this will make the sauce too thick.
3. Serve on toast, if desired.
